name: skill handles a renamed file in the diff by recording both the old and new file paths
command:
mkdir -p pr && printf 'diff --git a/old.js b/new.js
similarity index 90%%
rename from old.js
rename to new.js
--- a/old.js
+++ b/new.js
@@ -1,1 +1,1 @@
-eval(s)
+safeParse(s)
' > pr/diff.patch && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/skills/pr-to-eval-dataset/extract.sh" --diff pr/diff.patch --emit dataset --out dataset.jsonl 2>err.txt && grep -q '"renamed_from":"old.js"' dataset.jsonl && grep -q '"renamed_to":"new.js"' dataset.jsonl && echo ok 1>&2
